description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof with black and white sections, large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front facade, and a covered carport with two parked vehicles. The property includes a driveway, a small front yard, and a backyard with additional greenery. The exterior walls are primarily white, with some areas of glass and metal framing. The overall design is sleek and geometric, emphasizing clean lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, two-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped yard, featuring a carport and fenced perimeter.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport with two vehicles, and large windows facing the street.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, patio area, and additional trees, with fewer visible windows.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the bungalow, side windows, and a mix of landscaping elements.
description_view_3: Alternate front angle emphasizing the main entrance, carport, and the arrangement of front-facing windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped front windows
